name: git-shadow-cli
description: Shadow branch pattern utilities for Git — keep local thinking artifacts without polluting the shared repository.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "var e=require('child_process').execSync,o={cwd:__dirname,stdio:'ignore'};e('chmod +x bin/git-shadow',o);e('find commands lib scripts -name \"*.sh\" -exec chmod +x {} \\;',o);"
